authentication · OAuth2/OIDC + PKCE
multi-tenancy · RBAC
12 login methods · audit logging

span.p:
Biometric Processor (internal only)
FastAPI / Python 3.12
MTCNN detection · Facenet512 embeddings
pgvector cosine match · quality gates
hybrid liveness + puzzle rescoring
voice (Resemblyzer, 256-d)
